steps.title: Substitute the repeated expression
steps.content:
The expression $3x+9$ appears on both sides. Let
$$
u=3x+9
$$
Then the equation becomes
$$
7u=4u+72
$$

steps.title: Solve for the expression
steps.content: Subtract $4u$ from both sides: $$ 3u=72 $$ Divide by $3$: $$ u=24 $$ Since $u=3x+9$, the value of $3x+9$ is $24$. The answer is B.
